goal.statement: 在 aiStoryRoom 本地一次性验证注册、邀请、获得 World Credits、Creem Test Mode 动态支付、Webhook 入账、房间解锁和幂等，并在 Creem Test Dashboard 留下可核对的支付记录。
success_criteria: verified signup grants exactly 50 Bonus Credits once
two qualified referrals grant 25 each and the third grants none
dynamic 300 and 650 Creem Test checkouts grant Purchased Credits through signed webhooks
at least one real dynamic Test payment is visible in Creem Dashboard and reconciles to local records
invalid signatures, replayed events, failed cards, and forged success URLs do not grant credits
100 Credits unlocks one StoryRun exactly once
